subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved ones of the All-Merciful, dawning-places of divine knowledge, daysprings of certitude, and fountainheads of the remembrance of your mighty Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الرحمن و مطالع العرفان و مشارق الایقان و منابع ذکر ربکم العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @Mosaic imagery
